consignor.motivation: Consignor "AB Volvo Penta" with address in Gothenburg, Sweden in certificate matches exactly with invoice issuer company name and address after normalization. The legal company name and address on invoice matches certificate after normalizing juridical form and minor address formatting differences. Rule 4.1.0 on identification and rule 4.1.3.6 on legal form abbreviation were applied.

consignee.motivation: Consignee "Khonaysser Power Factory WLL" is explicitly found in invoice consignee section with matching detailed address and country Qatar. Name and address match exactly after allowed normalization per 4.2.2.1. Invoice contains a clear consignee field corresponding to certificate consignee.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Industrial Diesel Engines and accessories.
see attached invoice 61622463/1S, dated 2026-03-02
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description combined with an explicit invoice reference to invoice number 61622463/1S dated 2026-03-02. This matches invoice number and invoice date exactly, fulfilling rule 4.3.5. Therefore, goods description is considered verified without detailed text matching.

quantity.motivation: Gross Weight 22678.00 KG on certificate exactly matches Total Gross Weight 22678.00 KG on invoice. Both values correspond and are expressed in the same unit without conflicting figures. Allowed normalization of decimal truncation confirms match.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin lists "European Union", "Sweden", and "Lithuania". Invoice explicitly indicates origins as Sweden (SE), Lithuania (LT) and a general EU origin indication. EU origin normalization rules 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2 apply, confirming all certificate origin countries are explicitly present in invoice.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points matched between certificate and invoice with explicit references and allowed normalization. No mismatches or uncertainties found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet kan verifieras mot fakturan utan avvikelser. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
